message:
feat(obligation): graded type system for obligation safety

Add a type-level encoding where obligations carry resource annotations,
making leaks into compile warnings (#[must_use]) or runtime panics
(Drop). Extends obligation/mod.rs docs to cover both static leak
checking and the new graded surface.

- graded.rs (836 lines): GradedObligation type with reserve/resolve
  lifecycle, Resolution enum (Commit/Abort), and Drop-based leak
  detection. Includes typing judgment sketch mapping the linear type
  discipline to Rust's ownership model.
- mod.rs: updated module docs describing both analysis approaches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
